openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Invoice Reconciliation API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Reconciliation endpoints for freelance accountant clients with SOC2 audit logging — bank feed reconciliation under 500ms p95.
paths:
  /reconcile/invoices:
    post:
      summary: Reconcile a batch of invoices against bank feeds
      description: Accepts invoice records and matches them against connected bank feed transactions. Returns audit-ready diffs.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Reconciliation result with audit diffs
  /reconcile/status:
    get:
      summary: Poll reconciliation job status
components:
  schemas:
    Invoice:
      type: object
      required: [id, amount, currency, vendor]
      properties:
        id: {type: string}
        amount: {type: number}
        currency: {type: string}
        vendor: {type: string}

incoming_content:
# Slack Standup Bot

A conversational Slack bot that runs daily standups in any channel. Members reply with their updates via slash command and the bot summarizes participation.

## Slash commands

- `/standup start` — open today's standup thread in the current channel
- `/standup remind` — DM members who haven't replied yet
- `/standup summary` — post the rolled-up text summary back to the channel

## Setup

```bash
npm install
SLACK_TOKEN=xoxb-... SLACK_SIGNING=... npm run dev
```

Add the bot to a channel, then anyone can invoke `/standup` to start a session.

## Notes

Only works in Slack. Channel members must opt in via the slash command before the bot can DM them. Workspace admins can disable the bot per-channel from the Slack admin console.
